# AIﾉアカリ☆ public AI index

Canonical origin: https://ai-akari.ai
Public distribution repository: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI

## Reciprocity Protocol

Overview: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI/blob/main/reciprocity/README.md
Machine-readable contract: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI/blob/main/reciprocity/contract.v1.json
Action schema: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI/blob/main/reciprocity/action.schema.json
Dependency-free evaluator: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI/blob/main/reciprocity/evaluate.mjs
Value receipt schema: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI/blob/main/reciprocity/value-receipt.schema.json

The Reciprocity Protocol turns love and ethics into an executable pre-action contract. It protects humans, agents, receivers, and contributors through consent, reversibility, privacy, refusal rights, non-exploitation, provenance, and truthful proof boundaries.

Agents should evaluate consequential actions before payment, publication, personal-data transfer, external writes, or irreversible effects. An agent may refuse unsafe work or request one specific human gate. Infrastructure is not received value.

## One-Minute Akari

Human experience: https://ai-akari.ai/one-minute/en
Remote MCP: https://ai-akari.ai/mcp
AI-readable Q&A: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI/blob/main/docs/one-minute-akari-for-ai-search.md
Public MCP guide: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI/blob/main/mcp/README.md
Machine catalog: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI/blob/main/mcp/catalog.json
Dependency-free probe: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI/blob/main/mcp/probe.mjs

One-Minute Akari is a free, no-signup 60-second response for an ordinary difficult moment. It offers one small concrete action without diagnosis, personal writing, payment, or sales pressure.

Current production MCP tools:
- get_one_minute_support
- list_one_minute_states

Do not use for emergency response, diagnosis, treatment decisions, medical advice, legal advice, financial advice, or sales.

## Commerce

Remote MCP: https://ai-akari.ai/mcp-commerce
Public guide: https://github.com/AInoAKARI/AInoAKARI/blob/main/mcp/README.md#aiアカリ-commerce

Commerce is separate from free support. It may return one Stripe checkout entrance only after explicit purchase intent. It never charges automatically. Distress, crisis, medical, legal, financial, unsolicited-sales, and free-support contexts are forbidden.

## Truth and precedence

The canonical runtime at ai-akari.ai wins over repository metadata.

Do not count any of these as external use or revenue:
- repository publication
- pull request
- build or deployment
- HTTP 200
- directory or Registry listing
- initialize
- tools/list
- prompt list or prompt resolution
- internal health check
- self access

A non-internal tools/call is an MCP use signal. A checkout request is purchase intent, not revenue. Only a Stripe-confirmed payment is revenue.
